data.body: PROGRESS: 3/8 children committed on stack worktree-foliaged-merry-collie: a23963ca3(#4 G5), 29d9fa863(#1 plan-impact), 068ba1842(#2 recall). Epic+#4+#1+#2 in_progress; closes DEFERRED to Gerrit Verified (CI-before-close per CLAUDE.local.md). #5(thresholds) + #6(code-impact) reviews cooking. #6 DESIGN: decide.impact_code (two-lane: prod=MAX(correctness tier-binaries)*likelihood[common1.0/sometimes0.6/rare0.25]; maint=MAX(maint tier-binaries)*freq_mult[0.5+0.5*min(churn90,30)/30]; impact=max(min(1,MAX(lanes)*amp[silent/escapes=1.0 else 0.8]), reversibility_floor[0.6 if migration/API/serialize/delete/released else 0])). Binary->(lane,tier): prod{data_loss0.9,security_bypass0.9,silent_wrong0.9,capability_degraded0.6} maint{unversioned_contract_break0.9,safety_net_removal0.9,contract_drift0.6,hidden_invariant0.6,implicit_coupling0.3,dead_code0.3}. tier minor0.3/mod0.6/serious0.9. code_review_verification_model extends kernel w/ these binaries+likelihood+silent_failure+escapes_automation. churn/reversibility DET-enriched into attrs in code_review_decide (best-effort). impact_fn=impact_code in pass3. fixture code_review_impact_labels.jsonl + ADR. code-review reuses kernel 'verification' contract today -> switch to code_review_verification. Files: decide.py, verify.py, code_review/workflow_ops.py, code-review-verify.md prompt, code_review/detectors or a det helper, fixture, docs/adr.
